### LocaleNameProvider

提供应用本地化名称的上下文配置

```typescript
LocaleNameProvider: import("react").Provider<"de-DE" | "en-US" | "es-ES" | "fr-FR" | "id-ID" | "it-IT" | "ja-JP" | "ko-KR" | "pt-BR" | "ru-RU" | "th-TH" | "vi-VN" | "zh-CN" | "zh-HK" | "zh-TW" | "ms-MY" | undefined>
```

## Remarks

该组件用于包裹需要本地化名称支持的组件树， 可通过`value` 属性设置当前区域名称
